coupon.source_phrase_block: MELROSE PUBLIC LIBRARY – PEABODY ESSEX MUSEUM PASS This pass admits 2 people with a $12 co-pay per person (Thursday through Monday- children 16 and under are free, but still require a reservation). The library pass may only be used for the date printed on the pass. The library pass does not guarantee admission on a chosen date. Please visit the PEM website to review museum visitor requirements and any updates to operating hours. The library pass reservation calendar may not reflect changes to museum open dates and hours of operation. Reserve your Melrose Public Library pass for desired date. You will receive a confirmation email with an "Access Pass" link (if you do not have an email account, a printed confirmation may be picked up at the Main Desk of the library). THE LIBRARY PASS DOES NOT GUARANTEE ADMISSION Funded by the City of Melrose
